block.text: too When your instruments tell you that you penetrated to the heart of the storm, you take precious flask of Blue Potion and unstopper it. Yot quickly pour it through the ejection lock. It diffuses in the air around you. You smile; you know storm will quickly carry it to every part of Thalos But when ycu land, the people of the City o: Worship are still asleep. Obviously, the Potion was not sufficiently potent. Turn to 166.
